title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: TILLAMOOK OFFICE OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 5010 E Third Street Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the Federal Poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 304-3420 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3420 Toll-free (866) 206-4799 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Some services may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and assets LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Tillamook County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Going north on Highway 101, turn right on McCormick Loop Road. At the end of the road, take a left on Third Street. One-story tan building on the right side, across from the Forestry Department. Going south on Highway 101, turn left at the stop light after the Tillamook Cheese Factory (Wilson River Loop Road). Turn right at the first stop sign; it will still be named Wilson River Loop Road after the turn. Go past the blinking red light at the Highway 6 intersection and continue up a hill. Turn left at the stop sign onto Third Street. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
